title: Heart to Heart
writer: Dwinelle Benthall, Adelaide Heilbron, Rufus McCosh
actors: Mary Astor, Lloyd Hughes, Louise Fazenda
plot: A Midwestern girl returns home for her aunt's visit. Anticipating she will be dressed in fabulous ceremonial garb, they fail to recognize her in street clothes and mistake her for a seamstress; she goes along with it for fun.
